film.title: Good Time Max
film.overview: Two genius brothers grow up and grow apart as one becomes a successful surgeon and the other pursues a drug-fueled high life.

dialogues.dialogue: This is the surprise I talked about. I wanted to show 'em how well you were doing.  Why'd you bring her here? She hates me.  As if you haven't given her enough reason. Shame.  Shame? Look at your hairstyle.  Honey, honey, when are you gonna learn?
dialogues.cause_raw: causing harm or discomfort to others

dialogues.dialogue: Why'd you bring her here? She hates me.  As if you haven't given her enough reason. Shame.  Shame? Look at your hairstyle.  Honey, honey, when are you gonna learn?  Zebras don't change their stripes.
dialogues.cause_raw: causing harm or discomfort to others

dialogues.dialogue: Wow, this is... this is great, Adam.  It reminds me of the old days in New York.  Look, first of all, I want you to know how proud I am of you.  I mean, being clean for so long.  I never thought you could really do it.
- (Adam) Maybe. - Ha.  - I just know that I'm very humble. - (laughs) Humble, my a*s!  I'm just proud of how humble I am, that's all.  You should be humble.  Turn the lights down
